title: Why AI Made You Work Longer Hours
topic: ai adoption work hours review loop
audience: operators who adopted AI tools but feel busier than before
thesis: AI accelerates output but the review and approval loops dominate the timeline if you never redesign decision rights.
script:
Why AI made you work longer hours.
AI does generate faster, yet the review-and-approval loop after every output got longer.
When humans must read every result before it ships, automation amplifies the bottleneck instead of removing it.
The fix isn't more speed — it's redrawing who decides what, and when.
